data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for external directory links to internal users/subjects.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding external directory links to internal users/subjects. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as booking processes and user creation, without addressing the external directory links, leading to an inconclusive determination.
gaps: No evidence of external directory links to internal users/subjects validation.
